description.en: Build a Pandas analysis pipeline over telemetry_events in Supabase: at least two KPI metric functions (load → filter → datetime → groupby → aggregate), GET /telemetry/report with period and metrics JSON, 60-second in-memory cache, optional auth_failure_rate — metrics grouped by time, not global counts.
description.es: Construye un pipeline de análisis con Pandas sobre telemetry_events en Supabase: al menos dos funciones de métrica KPI (cargar → filtrar → datetime → groupby → agregar), GET /telemetry/report con JSON de period y metrics, caché en memoria 60s, auth_failure_rate opcional — métricas agrupadas en el tiempo, no recuentos globales.
